reminder.notes:
New app icon and alarm screen colors follow the app theme

### Features

- New app icon: a checklist notepad with a green checkmark on a green gradient, replacing the
  previous calendar icon on blue. Matches the app's own accent color.
- The alarm ring screen's Dismiss button and loading-state color now use the app's green theme
  accent instead of a hardcoded red.

### Bug fixes

No user-facing bug fixes in this release.

ai-scanner.notes:
# AI Scanner 1.2.0 — scan any folder you choose, clean duplicates first, export for the team

You now decide exactly where AI Scanner looks. Point it at any folder, let it clear out exact duplicates before it starts, then watch it understand each image one at a time.

### Features

- Choose your scan folder. Pick any folder on your device and AI Scanner scans it, including every subfolder inside it. Your choice is remembered and can be changed anytime in Settings. (Android; iPhone keeps scanning your Screenshots.)
- Duplicate cleanup before scanning. Before the first scan of a folder, AI Scanner finds byte-for-byte identical copies and shows them grouped so you can delete the extras first. It is fully optional — review, clean up, or skip and scan anyway.
- Scan everything once, then only what's new. The first time, every image in the folder is scanned one by one with clear progress — the current image, its name, and exactly what stage it's on — and you can stop anytime. After that, only newly added images are scanned.
- Export for dev review. A new Settings button bundles every scanned image together with its on-device AI review into a single ZIP you can share, so the team can use it to keep improving the app.

### Bug fixes

- No user-facing bug fixes in this release.

mirrordrive.notes:
# MirrorDrive 0.13.2

### Features
- No new features. This release fixes the in-app updater and one playback behavior.

### Bug fixes
- The in-app update check now actually works on a real phone. It previously gave up after 8 seconds while the network request itself could take up to 20, so on a normal mobile connection the check was abandoned before it finished and the update prompt never appeared. The check is now non-blocking: the app opens immediately and the update screen appears as soon as a new version is found.
- Deleting a file that is currently playing now stops playback at the same time, instead of continuing to play a file that no longer exists.

twinclean.notes: Diagnostic fix: the 'Connect Google Drive' failure path now shows the real underlying error instead of a generic message, so sign-in issues can actually be diagnosed. No feature changes.
